title: Repetition Penalty
documentation:
## Purpose
A lightweight repetition penalty parameter for machines that apply token-level discouragement of repeated output without full inference metadata.

## When to use
Use this type when connecting a simple numeric penalty value to a machine that does not require override-level controls. For full inference configuration, prefer [Repeat Penalty](https://capdag.com/browse/media:repeat-penalty;inference;sampling;user;task;textable;numeric), which includes metadata and override scope.

## Notes
Minimum value is 1.0 (no penalty). No upper bound is defined in this spec; check the target machine's documentation for practical limits. Values significantly above 1.5 risk degrading output coherence.
